title: hieracium laevigatum subsp. hypopityforme
intro: Hieracium laevigatum subsp. hypopityforme, also known as hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium laevigatum subsp. hypopityforme include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
